name: Primo Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cream cheese, powdered sugar, butter, honey, vanilla extract, and sweetened condensed milk (or chopped nuts) in a bowl. Blend until smooth.
2. Quickly stir in the melted unsweetened chocolate.
3. Pour the mixture into a buttered baking dish.
4. Spread evenly to about 1-inch thickness.
5. Chill until firm.
6. Cut into squares.
7. For an alternative, chill the fudge slightly first. With buttered hands, scoop out some of it and roll into a log. Roll in chopped pecans for a primo texture.
